title: panicum littorale
intro: Panicum littorale, also known as beach panic grass, is a perennial grass species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Australia, Asia, and Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Panicum littorale include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, as well as being made into a poultice or applied topically to affected areas.
